emails.subject: Your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] assessment results, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: What we found may surprise you...
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thank you for completing your health assessment with us. When we reviewed your responses about [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], something important stood out.

Most people dealing with what you're experiencing get told it's just stress, age, or bad luck. But what we often find is that these symptoms have a neurological component that traditional approaches miss entirely. Your brain and nervous system control everything - when communication breaks down between your brain and body, symptoms show up in predictable patterns.

The assessment revealed [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], which suggests your body is sending clear signals that something deeper needs attention. This is actually good news, because when we address the root cause rather than just managing symptoms, people often see changes they didn't think were possible.

We'd love to walk you through what we found and discuss whether [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] might be the right next step for you. No pressure, just answers.

[BOOKING_LINK]

To your health,
The Synergy Chiropractic Team

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back
emails.preview: The missing piece most treatments ignore
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Think of your nervous system like the electrical wiring in your home. When a circuit breaker keeps tripping, you wouldn't just keep flipping it back on - you'd want to know why it's happening in the first place.

Your brain constantly sends signals through your spine to every cell, tissue, and organ in your body. When something interferes with those signals - whether it's structural stress, neurological imbalance, or functional disconnect - your body adapts. At first, you might not notice. But over time, those adaptations create the symptoms you're dealing with now.

Most treatments focus on the breaker (your symptoms). We focus on the wiring (your nervous system). That's why standard care often provides temporary relief but the problem returns. The signal interference never got addressed.

Your assessment showed specific patterns consistent with [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT]. This tells us where to look and what might help. Our approach with [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] is designed to restore proper nervous system function, not just mask what you're feeling.

Want to learn more about what we found?

[BOOKING_LINK]

Dr. Mintz and team

emails.subject: Someone just like you, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Last month, we worked with someone whose assessment looked remarkably similar to yours. They'd been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] for years, tried multiple approaches, and were told they'd just have to live with it.

Their assessment revealed the same pattern you're showing: [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT]. We started with [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS], focusing on restoring proper neurological function rather than chasing symptoms.

After several weeks, they reported that the constant cycle had finally broken. They weren't just feeling temporary relief - something fundamental had shifted. Their body was working the way it should again. They wished they'd understood the root cause years earlier.

Of course, everyone's situation is unique and results vary based on many factors. We can't promise you'll have the same experience. But what we can promise is that we'll take the time to understand what's actually happening in your body and create a plan that makes sense for you.

Your assessment is complete. The next step is a conversation - no commitment required.

[BOOKING_LINK]

We're here when you're ready,
Synergy Chiropractic

Chronic Migraines: Throbbing head pain lasting hours or days
Missing work or activities due to headaches
Neck & Back Pain: Pain radiating into shoulders or arms
Previous injury that never fully healed
Vertigo & Dizziness: Anxiety about falling or losing balance
Fibromyalgia: Brain fog or difficulty thinking clearly
Ear Infections: Ear pain or tugging at ears
